item.title: Ronald Lubega @danteatype from Uganda is brilliant young designer and 46pgs. Mag...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Ronald Lubega @danteatype from Uganda is brilliant young designer and 46pgs. Magazine protegee.

Behind Ronald and 46pgs. is a story which deserves a full-time documentary movie. Those designers who are with us from No 7/8 knows the.full story. Long story short - when I met Ronald he was an 18-year old kid who must go out of orphanage. We make actions, I get in touch with two brothers who build the whole complex in which Ronald raised up. We did everything to pull this super talented kid out in the world and assure that he gets a job which matches his talent. A lot of work did Ronald by himself. We were backed up if he stuck somewhere.

Ronald became close with my oldest son.and very soon he started to call me dad and I called him son.
This stayed up today. We are in contact and Ronald earns for life as a designer.

Incredible. True. And many great things in-between. 46pgs. Magazine and JUDGENOT COLLECTIVE did actions which we hardly promiote.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Ronald Lubega @danteatype from Uganda is brilliant young designer and 46pgs. Magazine protegee.

Behind Ronald and 46pgs. is a story which deserves a full-time documentary movie. Those designers who are with us from No 7/8 knows the.full story. Long story short - when I met Ronald he was an 18-year old kid who must go out of orphanage. We make actions, I get in touch with two brothers who build the whole complex in which Ronald raised up. We did everything to pull this super talented kid out in the world and assure that he gets a job which matches his talent. A lot of work did Ronald by himself. We were backed up if he stuck somewhere.

Ronald became close with my oldest son.and very soon he started to call me dad and I called him son.
This stayed up today. We are in contact and Ronald earns for life as a designer.

Incredible. True. And many great things in-between. 46pgs. Magazine and JUDGENOT COLLECTIVE did actions which we hardly promiote.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: 46pgs

item.title: I got it again ! Yesssssssssa !!!! Looking at Rafal Lukaszuk @rl_d35i9n works fo...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

I got it again ! Yesssssssssa !!!! Looking at Rafal Lukaszuk @rl_d35i9n works for the first time and, what is most important for me, - I found this amazing designer following my instinct. When I open Rafal's feed - I feel this overwhelming feeling of pure satisfaction and joy because I got him on the base of its avatar pic. I swear to you.
When we started I didn't search designers by type "grunge graphic design" in the search bar but just by looking at designers one post, or we liked each other's works, or just by looking at avatar - and I hit the bullseye almost every time.

It's not polite to brag about yourself and I don't do that but I love this feeling when I find a great and amazing designer like Rafal @rl_d35i9n is.

Rafal's works are great on many levels and from many sides. I love everything I saw on his feed and you can take any of his works and you won't make a mistake. Every work designed by Rafal @rl_d35i9n is amazing. He is not boring because every work is different and at the same time you can tell that this and that is his work. Rafal has his style which is dusty, blurred, same titles in many great typo appearances which is so fuckin well connected with visual elements on works.

Fuckin great designer design true grunge pieces !
Rafal Lukaszuk @rl_d35i9n baby ! Yesssssssssa !

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram

🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

I got it again ! Yesssssssssa !!!! Looking at Rafal Lukaszuk @rl_d35i9n works for the first time and, what is most important for me, - I found this amazing designer following my instinct. When I open Rafal's feed - I feel this overwhelming feeling of pure satisfaction and joy because I got him on the base of its avatar pic. I swear to you.
When we started I didn't search designers by type "grunge graphic design" in the search bar but just by looking at designers one post, or we liked each other's works, or just by looking at avatar - and I hit the bullseye almost every time.

It's not polite to brag about yourself and I don't do that but I love this feeling when I find a great and amazing designer like Rafal @rl_d35i9n is.

Rafal's works are great on many levels and from many sides. I love everything I saw on his feed and you can take any of his works and you won't make a mistake. Every work designed by Rafal @rl_d35i9n is amazing. He is not boring because every work is different and at the same time you can tell that this and that is his work. Rafal has his style which is dusty, blurred, same titles in many great typo appearances which is so fuckin well connected with visual elements on works.

Fuckin great designer design true grunge pieces !
Rafal Lukaszuk @rl_d35i9n baby ! Yesssssssssa !

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

item.author: 46pgs

item.title: Everyone loves and admires Liz Carlson @collizage and her amazing collages which...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Everyone loves and admires Liz Carlson @collizage and her amazing collages which are "categories" for themselves. Liz collage works are so eye-catching and she does one great thing on her collages which lead your eyes on the most interesting parts on Liz works.
As per my opinion this is the use of typography on her works. Very intelligent use of typography which simply leads you through her work.

I love the use of typography on every kind of work but Liz collages are distinctive in general from others and this distinctive element is Liz's incredible good understanding and feeling for composition and for "cutting" her own world on parts by use of typography and "force" us to study those parts first every single one as work for itself and then when you finish with review of every cut on her work, all you have to do is to blur your own eyes and look at the work as one unity and slowly sharpen your eyes and look at work as one complete and finished composition - in this moment you can realize genius and distinctive originality of Liz Carlson's collage works.

Very intelligent use of elements (which all use) and typo in order to make distinctive original works recognizable as Liz's work. And equally with the mentioned - gifted artist who didn't neglect her natural born gift for composition of graphic design elements which all use but very few in such a distinctive and original way as Liz does.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (20 medier)

@46pgs

Everyone loves and admires Liz Carlson @collizage and her amazing collages which are "categories" for themselves. Liz collage works are so eye-catching and she does one great thing on her collages which lead your eyes on the most interesting parts on Liz works.
As per my opinion this is the use of typography on her works. Very intelligent use of typography which simply leads you through her work.

I love the use of typography on every kind of work but Liz collages are distinctive in general from others and this distinctive element is Liz's incredible good understanding and feeling for composition and for "cutting" her own world on parts by use of typography and "force" us to study those parts first every single one as work for itself and then when you finish with review of every cut on her work, all you have to do is to blur your own eyes and look at the work as one unity and slowly sharpen your eyes and look at work as one complete and finished composition - in this moment you can realize genius and distinctive originality of Liz Carlson's collage works.

Very intelligent use of elements (which all use) and typo in order to make distinctive original works recognizable as Liz's work. And equally with the mentioned - gifted artist who didn't neglect her natural born gift for composition of graphic design elements which all use but very few in such a distinctive and original way as Liz does.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: 46pgs

item.title: Rory Mincin @cellgrafter is a graphic designer, 46pgs. graphic designer and Man ...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (14 medier)

@46pgs

Rory Mincin @cellgrafter is a graphic designer, 46pgs. graphic designer and Man who prove that he is not just an amazing graphic designer but, as I said, also a Man - which I appreciate the most.

He is not one of those kind of graphic designers who are yelling and designing "calls on revolution" with one hand and with other type "nah, its too much politics" about genocide in Palestine.

Do not misunderstand this man for this kind of people; - well I promise to my very good friend and common sense that I will sustain myself in giving adjectives to those who have the ability to focus, at the same time, to do 2 diametrically opposite things; - for those designers. They are just designers. This is their top achievement.

Beside Rory is an amazing designer he never ran from truth and changed the word "truth" for "political correctness". And Rory has my utmost respect as a designer and, as I told you, what is most important - as a Man.

Rory have his very unique design style but I always welcomed his expeditions into things like on 1st post. This just prove one thing more: Rory have ability to switches through the styles.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs

Se slideshow på Instagram

🖼️ Slideshow (14 medier)

@46pgs

Rory Mincin @cellgrafter is a graphic designer, 46pgs. graphic designer and Man who prove that he is not just an amazing graphic designer but, as I said, also a Man - which I appreciate the most.

He is not one of those kind of graphic designers who are yelling and designing "calls on revolution" with one hand and with other type "nah, its too much politics" about genocide in Palestine.

Do not misunderstand this man for this kind of people; - well I promise to my very good friend and common sense that I will sustain myself in giving adjectives to those who have the ability to focus, at the same time, to do 2 diametrically opposite things; - for those designers. They are just designers. This is their top achievement.

Beside Rory is an amazing designer he never ran from truth and changed the word "truth" for "political correctness". And Rory has my utmost respect as a designer and, as I told you, what is most important - as a Man.

Rory have his very unique design style but I always welcomed his expeditions into things like on 1st post. This just prove one thing more: Rory have ability to switches through the styles.

#grungedesign
#graphicdesign #graphicdesigners #typography #46pgs
